action_set_definitions.name: get_ledger_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full list of internal company ledger transactions containing id, date, description, and amount for cost analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: get_internal_discrepancies
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of flagged errors, timing differences, and internal cost reversals requiring adjustment in the ledger reconciliation.

state_description.ledger_entries: List of internal company transactions containing id, date, description, and amount.
state_description.bank_statement_entries: List of transactions reported by the bank containing id, date, description, and amount.
state_description.reconciled_pairs: Mappings of ledger_id to bank_id that have been successfully matched.
state_description.ledger_balance: Current total balance calculated from the ledger entries.
state_description.bank_balance: Current ending balance reported by the bank statement.
state_description.discrepancies: List of items flagged as errors or timing differences requiring adjustment.
